title: INF-6 Abliteration offline weight-orthogonalization tool (CLI binary; NOT a runtime path)
goal: Build an OFFLINE abliteration tool per AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE and operator decision E-5: takes a base model + refusal direction extracted via INF-4 + output path, performs weight orthogonalisation against the refusal direction (kabachuha/abliterate.cpp pattern), writes a new GGUF (or safetensors) as a derived model artifact. NEVER inserted into ModelRuntime.generate per spec §4.7.4.
expected_diff_shape: New Rust binary src/backend/handshake_core/src/bin/abliterate.rs (CLI tool with clap arg parsing); src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/abliterate.rs (the actual orthogonalisation algorithm; lives under distillation/ allowed_paths); Cargo.toml [[bin]] section.
unblock_conditions: MT-082 hooks + MT-083 transformer + MT-100 refusal extraction merged (refusal direction is input to abliteration).
implementation_notes: Per AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE + spec §4.7.4 + operator E-5: abliteration is OFFLINE TOOL ONLY. Never inserted into a hot inference path or ModelRuntime::generate. Output is a new derived model artifact with own ModelId + on-disk GGUF/safetensors. Passes through §4.8 content-review pipeline (PII scan + license tagging + provenance) before any Skill Bank reference. ProcessOwnershipLedger records the job as `engine_kind="abliteration_tool"`. CLI args: `--base-model <PATH>` (GGUF or safetensors), `--refusal-direction <PATH>` (JSON file written by INF-4 extraction with `{layer, values, ...}`), `--out-model <PATH>` (output GGUF/safetensors), `--license-tag <STRING>`, `--provenance-note <STRING>`. Algorithm (kabachuha/abliterate.cpp pattern, ported to Rust): load weight tensors of the target Linear modules (typically o_proj of every attention block and down_proj of every MLP block per refusal-direction research); for each target weight tensor W, compute orthogonalised W' = W - (W @ direction.unsqueeze(-1)) @ direction.unsqueeze(0); write back. For GGUF input: use llama-cpp-2 quantize-roundtrip helpers OR a small standalone GGUF reader/writer (gguf-rs crate if available). For safetensors: candle_core::safetensors helpers. Output carries provenance metadata: { base_model_sha256, refusal_direction_sha256, abliteration_tool_version, abliterated_at_utc, license_tag, operator_signature }. Spawn-time: register a ProcessOwnershipLedger row with engine_kind=AbliterationTool (per MT-069 EngineKind enum). Hot-path invariant test: a static-analysis-style cargo test scans model_runtime/llama_cpp/generate.rs + model_runtime/candle/generate.rs for any call into distillation::abliterate; if any, fail with HBR-INT-002 violation. CLI tests (env-gated): given small fixture model + fixture direction, produce output; verify output loads; verify weight differs at target modules; verify provenance metadata preserved.
risk_if_missed: INF-6 OFFLINE TOOL ONLY invariant unenforced; abliteration ends up in hot path; spec §4.7.4 violated.
validator_focus: Static analysis test enforcing no hot-path call into abliterate module; provenance preserved; ProcessOwnershipLedger row with engine_kind=AbliterationTool; license_tag required.

minimum_controls: Hot-path invariant: static-analysis test rejects any generate.rs reference to abliterate module.
